parameters.command:
mkdir -p /code/Automation/n8n
# Check /code is a mountpoint (returns 0 if mounted)
if mountpoint -q /code; then
  # Try exporting all workflows into a single file; fall back to per-workflow export if CLI differs
  if command -v n8n >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    n8n export:workflow --all --output=/code/Automation/n8n/workflows.json || n8n export:workflow --all --separate --output=/code/Automation/n8n
  else
    echo "n8n CLI not available; aborting export"
    exit 1
  fi
else
  echo "/code is not mounted; skipping export"
  exit 0
fi
